query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 360051 - Biblical Mandate for Discipleship
(360051, 'What is the Great Commission found in?', 'multiple_choice', '["Matthew 28:18-20","John 3:16","Romans 8:28","Acts 1:8"]', 'Matthew 28:18-20', 1),
(360051, 'The Greek word mathetes means what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Teacher","Learner/disciple","Pastor","Evangelist"]', 'Learner/disciple', 2),
(360051, 'Jesus commanded His disciples to make disciples of whom?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only Jews","Only Gentiles","All nations","Only the religious"]', 'All nations', 3),
(360051, 'Discipleship involves what key activities?', 'multiple_choice', '["Going, baptizing, teaching","Preaching only","Building churches","Writing books"]', 'Going, baptizing, teaching', 4),
(360051, 'How long did Jesus invest in His disciples?', 'multiple_choice', '["One year","Two years","About three years","Five years"]', 'About three years', 5),
(360051, 'The goal of discipleship is to produce what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Church members","Mature followers of Christ","Religious people","Bible scholars"]', 'Mature followers of Christ', 6),
(360051, 'Jesus promise in the Great Commission is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Success in ministry","I am with you always","Financial prosperity","Large churches"]', 'I am with you always', 7),
(360051, 'Discipleship is best described as what?', 'multiple_choice', '["A program","A lifestyle of following Jesus","A class","A membership requirement"]', 'A lifestyle of following Jesus', 8),
(360051, 'The early church grew through what primary method?', 'multiple_choice', '["Mass evangelism only","Discipleship and multiplication","Building programs","Political influence"]', 'Discipleship and multiplication', 9),
(360051, 'What did Paul instruct Timothy to do with what he learned?', 'multiple_choice', '["Keep it to himself","Entrust it to faithful men who will teach others","Write books","Start a seminary"]', 'Entrust it to faithful men who will teach others', 10),
(360051, 'Explain the relationship between evangelism and discipleship in fulfilling the Great Commission.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Evangelism brings people to Christ; discipleship develops them into mature believers who can then make more disciples.', 11),

-- Lesson 360052 - Jesus Model of Discipleship
(360052, 'How many disciples did Jesus choose for intensive training?', 'multiple_choice', '["3","7","12","70"]', '12', 1),
(360052, 'Jesus discipleship method primarily involved what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Classroom lectures","Life-on-life relationship","Written curriculum","Distance learning"]', 'Life-on-life relationship', 2),
(360052, 'The inner circle of Jesus disciples included whom?', 'multiple_choice', '["Peter, James, John","Matthew, Mark, Luke","Andrew, Philip, Thomas","All twelve equally"]', 'Peter, James, John', 3),
(360052, 'Jesus taught His disciples through what methods?', 'multiple_choice', '["Parables, example, and experience","Books only","Lectures only","Memorization only"]', 'Parables, example, and experience', 4),
(360052, 'What did Jesus do before choosing His disciples?', 'multiple_choice', '["Interviewed them","Prayed all night","Tested their knowledge","Checked their background"]', 'Prayed all night', 5),
(360052, 'Jesus sent His disciples out to minister how?', 'multiple_choice', '["Alone","In pairs","In large groups","Only after His death"]', 'In pairs', 6),
(360052, 'What was Jesus approach to His disciples failures?', 'multiple_choice', '["Immediate dismissal","Patient correction and restoration","Public rebuke","Ignoring them"]', 'Patient correction and restoration', 7),
(360052, 'The disciples were called to be with Jesus and to what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Study Scripture","Be sent out to preach","Build synagogues","Write gospels"]', 'Be sent out to preach', 8),
(360052, 'Jesus invested most of His time in what group?', 'multiple_choice', '["The crowds","The religious leaders","His disciples","The Romans"]', 'His disciples', 9),
(360052, 'What did Jesus promise to make His disciples?', 'multiple_choice', '["Religious scholars","Fishers of men","Church leaders","Wealthy"]', 'Fishers of men', 10),
(360052, 'Describe three key elements of Jesus discipleship model that can be applied today.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Selection through prayer, life-on-life relationship, teaching through example and experience, gradual release to ministry.', 11),

-- Lesson 360053 - Spiritual Formation and Growth
(360053, 'Spiritual formation is the process of what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Learning theology","Being conformed to the image of Christ","Attending church","Reading the Bible"]', 'Being conformed to the image of Christ', 1),
(360053, 'According to 2 Peter 3:18, believers are to grow in what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Knowledge only","Grace and knowledge","Church attendance","Ministry skills"]', 'Grace and knowledge', 2),
(360053, 'The fruit of the Spirit is evidence of what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Spiritual maturity","Salvation","Church membership","Bible knowledge"]', 'Spiritual maturity', 3),
(360053, 'Spiritual growth requires what from the believer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Passive waiting","Active cooperation with the Spirit","Perfect obedience","Isolation"]', 'Active cooperation with the Spirit', 4),
(360053, 'What hinders spiritual growth according to Hebrews 5:12-14?', 'multiple_choice', '["Lack of education","Remaining on spiritual milk","Busy schedules","Difficult circumstances"]', 'Remaining on spiritual milk', 5),
(360053, 'The goal of spiritual formation is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Religious knowledge","Christlikeness","Church leadership","Perfect behavior"]', 'Christlikeness', 6),
(360053, 'Spiritual growth happens through what means?', 'multiple_choice', '["Word, prayer, fellowship, service","Education only","Experience only","Time only"]', 'Word, prayer, fellowship, service', 7),
(360053, 'What role does community play in spiritual formation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Essential for growth and accountability","Unnecessary","Harmful"]', 'Essential for growth and accountability', 8),
(360053, 'Trials and difficulties serve what purpose in spiritual growth?', 'multiple_choice', '["Punishment","Character development","No purpose","Discouragement"]', 'Character development', 9),
(360053, 'Who is the primary agent of spiritual transformation?', 'multiple_choice', '["The believer","The pastor","The Holy Spirit","The church"]', 'The Holy Spirit', 10),
(360053, 'Explain how the Holy Spirit and human responsibility work together in spiritual formation.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Spirit empowers and transforms while believers cooperate through spiritual disciplines, obedience, and yielding to God.', 11),

-- Lesson 360054 - Developing Spiritual Disciplines
(360054, 'Spiritual disciplines are best understood as what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Rules to follow","Means of grace for growth","Requirements for salvation","Optional practices"]', 'Means of grace for growth', 1),
(360054, 'Which is NOT typically considered a spiritual discipline?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Fasting","Entertainment","Scripture reading"]', 'Entertainment', 2),
(360054, 'The purpose of spiritual disciplines is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["To earn God favor","To position ourselves for transformation","To impress others","To feel spiritual"]', 'To position ourselves for transformation', 3),
(360054, 'Bible meditation differs from Eastern meditation how?', 'multiple_choice', '["It empties the mind","It fills the mind with Scripture","It uses mantras","It seeks enlightenment"]', 'It fills the mind with Scripture', 4),
(360054, 'Fasting is primarily about what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Losing weight","Spiritual focus and dependence on God","Impressing others","Following rules"]', 'Spiritual focus and dependence on God', 5),
(360054, 'The discipline of solitude helps us how?', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoid people","Hear God and examine our hearts","Be antisocial","Escape responsibility"]', 'Hear God and examine our hearts', 6),
(360054, 'Corporate worship is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Is required","Builds community and glorifies God together","Replaces private devotion","Is traditional"]', 'Builds community and glorifies God together', 7),
(360054, 'The discipline of service reflects what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Our works-righteousness","Christ servant heart","Our abilities","Church programs"]', 'Christ servant heart', 8),
(360054, 'How should spiritual disciplines be practiced?', 'multiple_choice', '["Legalistically","With grace and consistency","Sporadically","Only when convenient"]', 'With grace and consistency', 9),
(360054, 'Journaling as a spiritual discipline helps with what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Writing skills","Reflection, prayer, and tracking growth","Publishing","Record keeping"]', 'Reflection, prayer, and tracking growth', 10),
(360054, 'Describe how to develop a sustainable personal devotional life.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Choose a consistent time and place, start small, include Scripture reading and prayer, be flexible but committed.', 11),

-- Lesson 360055 - One-on-One Discipleship
(360055, 'One-on-one discipleship is modeled after whose example?', 'multiple_choice', '["Paul and Timothy","Moses and Joshua","Jesus and the Twelve","All of the above"]', 'All of the above', 1),
(360055, 'The key to effective one-on-one discipleship is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Curriculum","Relationship and intentionality","Formal meetings","Credentials"]', 'Relationship and intentionality', 2),
(360055, 'A discipler should be what kind of person?', 'multiple_choice', '["Perfect","A growing believer willing to share life","A seminary graduate","A pastor only"]', 'A growing believer willing to share life', 3),
(360055, 'How often should discipleship meetings occur?', 'multiple_choice', '["Once a year","Regularly and consistently","Only when problems arise","Never"]', 'Regularly and consistently', 4),
(360055, 'Accountability in discipleship serves what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Control","Encouragement and growth","Judgment","Reporting"]', 'Encouragement and growth', 5),
(360055, 'What should be included in discipleship meetings?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture, prayer, life application, accountability","Lectures only","Social time only","Counseling only"]', 'Scripture, prayer, life application, accountability', 6),
(360055, 'The goal of one-on-one discipleship is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Dependency on the discipler","Maturity and ability to disciple others","Church membership","Bible knowledge"]', 'Maturity and ability to disciple others', 7),
(360055, 'How long should a discipleship relationship last?', 'multiple_choice', '["Forever","Until the disciple can disciple others","One month","One year exactly"]', 'Until the disciple can disciple others', 8),
(360055, 'What is the multiplication principle in discipleship?', 'multiple_choice', '["Adding members","Each disciple making disciples who make disciples","Church growth programs","Evangelism campaigns"]', 'Each disciple making disciples who make disciples', 9),
(360055, 'Confidentiality in discipleship is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hides sin","Builds trust for honest sharing","Protects reputation","Is legally required"]', 'Builds trust for honest sharing', 10),
(360055, 'Outline a basic plan for beginning a one-on-one discipleship relationship.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Pray for guidance, identify a willing person, establish meeting rhythm, use Scripture-based content, build relationship.', 11);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES

(360052, 'The disciples were called to be with Jesus and to what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Study Scripture","Be sent out to preach","Build synagogues","Write gospels"]', 'Be sent out to preach', 8),
(360052, 'Jesus invested most of His time in what group?', 'multiple_choice', '["The crowds","The religious leaders","His disciples","The Romans"]', 'His disciples', 9),
(360052, 'What did Jesus promise to make His disciples?', 'multiple_choice', '["Religious scholars","Fishers of men","Church leaders","Wealthy"]', 'Fishers of men', 10),
(360052, 'Describe three key elements of Jesus discipleship model that can be applied today.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Selection through prayer, life-on-life relationship, teaching through example and experience, gradual release to ministry.', 11),

-- Lesson 360053 - Spiritual Formation and Growth
(360053, 'Spiritual formation is the process of what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Learning theology","Being conformed to the image of Christ","Attending church","Reading the Bible"]', 'Being conformed to the image of Christ', 1),
(360053, 'According to 2 Peter 3:18, believers are to grow in what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Knowledge only","Grace and knowledge","Church attendance","Ministry skills"]', 'Grace and knowledge', 2),
(360053, 'The fruit of the Spirit is evidence of what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Spiritual maturity","Salvation","Church membership","Bible knowledge"]', 'Spiritual maturity', 3),
(360053, 'Spiritual growth requires what from the believer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Passive waiting","Active cooperation with the Spirit","Perfect obedience","Isolation"]', 'Active cooperation with the Spirit', 4),
(360053, 'What hinders spiritual growth according to Hebrews 5:12-14?', 'multiple_choice', '["Lack of education","Remaining on spiritual milk","Busy schedules","Difficult circumstances"]', 'Remaining on spiritual milk', 5),
(360053, 'The goal of spiritual formation is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Religious knowledge","Christlikeness","Church leadership","Perfect behavior"]', 'Christlikeness', 6),
(360053, 'Spiritual growth happens through what means?', 'multiple_choice', '["Word, prayer, fellowship, service","Education only","Experience only","Time only"]', 'Word, prayer, fellowship, service', 7),
(360053, 'What role does community play in spiritual formation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Essential for growth and accountability","Unnecessary","Harmful"]', 'Essential for growth and accountability', 8),
(360053, 'Trials and difficulties serve what purpose in spiritual growth?', 'multiple_choice', '["Punishment","Character development","No purpose","Discouragement"]', 'Character development', 9),
(360053, 'Who is the primary agent of spiritual transformation?', 'multiple_choice', '["The believer","The pastor","The Holy Spirit","The church"]', 'The Holy Spirit', 10),
(360053, 'Explain how the Holy Spirit and human responsibility work together in spiritual formation.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Spirit empowers and transforms while believers cooperate through spiritual disciplines, obedience, and yielding to God.', 11),

-- Lesson 360054 - Developing Spiritual Disciplines
(360054, 'Spiritual disciplines are best understood as what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Rules to follow","Means of grace for growth","Requirements for salvation","Optional practices"]', 'Means of grace for growth', 1),
(360054, 'Which is NOT typically considered a spiritual discipline?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Fasting","Entertainment","Scripture reading"]', 'Entertainment', 2),
(360054, 'The purpose of spiritual disciplines is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["To earn God favor","To position ourselves for transformation","To impress others","To feel spiritual"]', 'To position ourselves for transformation', 3),
(360054, 'Bible meditation differs from Eastern meditation how?', 'multiple_choice', '["It empties the mind","It fills the mind with Scripture","It uses mantras","It seeks enlightenment"]', 'It fills the mind with Scripture', 4),
(360054, 'Fasting is primarily about what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Losing weight","Spiritual focus and dependence on God","Impressing others","Following rules"]', 'Spiritual focus and dependence on God', 5),
(360054, 'The discipline of solitude helps us how?', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoid people","Hear God and examine our hearts","Be antisocial","Escape responsibility"]', 'Hear God and examine our hearts', 6),
(360054, 'Corporate worship is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Is required","Builds community and glorifies God together","Replaces private devotion","Is traditional"]', 'Builds community and glorifies God together', 7),
(360054, 'The discipline of service reflects what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Our works-righteousness","Christ servant heart","Our abilities","Church programs"]', 'Christ servant heart', 8),
(360054, 'How should spiritual disciplines be practiced?', 'multiple_choice', '["Legalistically","With grace and consistency","Sporadically","Only when convenient"]', 'With grace and consistency', 9),
(360054, 'Journaling as a spiritual discipline helps with what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Writing skills","Reflection, prayer, and tracking growth","Publishing","Record keeping"]', 'Reflection, prayer, and tracking growth', 10),
(360054, 'Describe how to develop a sustainable personal devotional life.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Choose a consistent time and place, start small, include Scripture reading and prayer, be flexible but committed.', 11),

-- Lesson 360055 - One-on-One Discipleship
(360055, 'One-on-one discipleship is modeled after whose example?', 'multiple_choice', '["Paul and Timothy","Moses and Joshua","Jesus and the Twelve","All of the above"]', 'All of the above', 1),
(360055, 'The key to effective one-on-one discipleship is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Curriculum","Relationship and intentionality","Formal meetings","Credentials"]', 'Relationship and intentionality', 2),
(360055, 'A discipler should be what kind of person?', 'multiple_choice', '["Perfect","A growing believer willing to share life","A seminary graduate","A pastor only"]', 'A growing believer willing to share life', 3),
(360055, 'How often should discipleship meetings occur?', 'multiple_choice', '["Once a year","Regularly and consistently","Only when problems arise","Never"]', 'Regularly and consistently', 4),
(360055, 'Accountability in discipleship serves what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Control","Encouragement and growth","Judgment","Reporting"]', 'Encouragement and growth', 5),
(360055, 'What should be included in discipleship meetings?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture, prayer, life application, accountability","Lectures only","Social time only","Counseling only"]', 'Scripture, prayer, life application, accountability', 6),
(360055, 'The goal of one-on-one discipleship is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Dependency on the discipler","Maturity and ability to disciple others","Church membership","Bible knowledge"]', 'Maturity and ability to disciple others', 7),
(360055, 'How long should a discipleship relationship last?', 'multiple_choice', '["Forever","Until the disciple can disciple others","One month","One year exactly"]', 'Until the disciple can disciple others', 8),
(360055, 'What is the multiplication principle in discipleship?', 'multiple_choice', '["Adding members","Each disciple making disciples who make disciples","Church growth programs","Evangelism campaigns"]', 'Each disciple making disciples who make disciples', 9),
(360055, 'Confidentiality in discipleship is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hides sin","Builds trust for honest sharing","Protects reputation","Is legally required"]', 'Builds trust for honest sharing', 10),
(360055, 'Outline a basic plan for beginning a one-on-one discipleship relationship.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Pray for guidance, identify a willing person, establish meeting rhythm, use Scripture-based content, build relationship.', 11);
